Mr. Chandrakumar, oru vishayam solluven, athu kekkara thairiyam ungalukku irukka?
Oru payala yemaathanumna avan aasaikku thoondil podanum.
Avanuku antha area-la oru periya kootame irukku.
Vaazhkai oru vattam da, inge jeyikiravan thopan, thokkuravan jeyipan.
Namma kooda irukkuravangala namma paathukitta, nammala mela irukkan paathupan.
